description: Recto: Accounts of a bookseller (Shelomo b. Eliyyahu?). In Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals. "The four copies from Cairo sold for.... Al-Rayyis Mufaḍḍal has books for auction: Moznayim(?); some commentaries; a book about the fundamentals of Hebrew poetry... Kitāb al-Uṣūl; ... of Rabbenu Baḥye (ZL)." Verso: miscellaneous accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
